GeneDef.label: atlantic soul
GeneDef.description: The Atlantic embody adaptability — forged by ocean winds and shifting tides. Their blood sings with salt and stubborn endurance.

GeneDef.label: cascadian wilds
GeneDef.description: Children of misty forests and basalt mountains. The Cascadians are unshaken by rain or solitude, ever patient and feral at heart.

GeneDef.label: nat'l diversity
GeneDef.description: The Ninety-Nine Tribes carry ancestral echoes — every heart a drumbeat in a chorus of shared memory.

GeneDef.label: texico grit
GeneDef.description: Dust storms and refinery fumes forged the Texicans — weathered souls fueled by stubborn pride and old oil.

GeneDef.label: numen roots
GeneDef.description: The Numen are entwined with the land — their spirits a living testament to survival against all odds.

GeneDef.label: human spirit
GeneDef.description: The Pure Humans embody the resilience of unaltered humanity — a steadfast spirit that endures through every trial.

GeneDef.label: slanter echo
GeneDef.description: The Slanters drift between worlds — dreamers and schemers with eyes like broken glass, caught between memory and myth.

GeneDef.label: super mutant might
GeneDef.description: The Super Mutants’ strength is legend — a fusion of pain and pride that outlived their makers.

GeneDef.label: two-californian duality
GeneDef.description: Split between paradise and ruin, the Two Californians live in contradiction — both dreamers and survivors of their own myth.

GeneDef.label: vault heritage
GeneDef.description: Raised under steel and silence, the Vault Dwellers’ heritage is order — a longing for structure even in chaos.

GeneDef.label: wendigo hunger
GeneDef.description: The Wendigo embody hunger made flesh — a spirit of endless wanting that no feast can sate.
